Hero.title: DevOps & Cloud Engineer
Hero.bio: I specialize in Cloud Computing and DevOps, with a passion for exploring the Internet of Things (IoT). I enjoy bridging the gap between hardware and software to engineer intelligent automation solutions.

btech.bullet1: Managing Linux administration, server automation via Ansible (IaC), and cloud exploration with OpenStack & Ceph.
btech.bullet2: Streamlining application workflows with Docker, Kubernetes cluster management, and GitLab CI/CD integration.
btech.bullet3: Implementing real-time monitoring via Prometheus & Grafana, paired with operational efficiency using Bash scripting.

TechStack.title: Tech Stack
TechStack.description: The tools and technologies I work with daily to build, deploy, and maintain cloud-native infrastructure.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.description: I am open to collaborations, new opportunities, and in-depth discussions regarding cloud infrastructure, DevOps practices, and IoT automation solutions. Let's connect!
